Value: Product sort selection does not persist after browser page refresh

When a user applies a custom sort order on the inventory page and then refreshes the browser the sort preference is lost and silently reverts to the default order (Name A to Z). The sort dropdown visually resets without any notification to the user.
2. On the Products page click the sort dropdown (top-right)
4. Confirm products are displayed in Z to A order
5. Press F5 or click the browser Refresh button
6. Observe the sort dropdown and product order
The applied sort preference should persist after page refresh. If it resets the user should be notified of the state change.
Sort dropdown reverts to Name (A to Z) after page refresh. Products re-render in default order. The selected sort state is lost with no feedback to the user.
Applies to all 4 sort options: A-Z / Z-A / Price Low-High / Price High-Low
